content: Just as biological/chemical agents produce targeted effects in a host system by acting within their intrinsic capacity limits, AI agents’ constrained working memory is not a bug to fix — it is a feature that shapes their ability to produce focused, actionable causal effects on the tasks they operate on. Unbounded working memory would diffuse an AI agent’s causal power, much like an over-diffused biological weapon agent loses its ability to generate a targeted impact.
source_topics: agent working memory capacity limits reasoning
